fields.name: Field No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier of the monitored field.

fields.name: Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the monitored field.

fields.name: Notify
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to send an email notification when the value in this monitored field is changed. The email is sent to the recipient specified on the Field Monitoring Setup page.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table that includes the monitored field.
